entities.name: Inbound Resurrection Through Friction
entities.context: Position that inbound recruiting can be revived by deliberately adding friction rather than removing it

entities.name: Auto-apply tools
entities.context: Tools that automate job applications by removing barriers, cited as failed approach that flooded employers with low-signal volume

entities.name: Two-sided value exchange
entities.context: Framework where job seekers who invest effort get better matches while employers get higher-signal applicants

entities.name: Filtering for effort
entities.context: Principle of evaluating candidates based on demonstrated investment and self-knowledge rather than just credentials

relationships.context: Proposed as counter-strategy to auto-apply's failure from removing all barriers
The friction-based approach creates mutual value for both job seekers and employers
Core mechanism that makes inbound work again by requiring candidates to demonstrate investment
